blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Fresh orgs expose no live analyzed-study path, and /studies/demo-study/overview crashes instead of showing a populated lifecycle.
The browser surface did not expose a real analyzed study with structured per-run summary output.
No live clustered study with infra_error/cancelled handling was reachable from the browser surface.
The browser only exposed issue-card summaries, not full raw IssueCluster fields.
Impact-score formula inputs and raw scores are not user-visible in the browser.
The browser showed ranked demo cards but not live score/order proof for a real analyzed study.
Headline-metric calculation correctness could not be proven from browser-visible data alone.
Only the demo report route was populated, and it is not authoritative for live limitations validation.
Report artifact keys are not exposed on the current browser surface.
No browser-visible path exposed a generated HTML report artifact.
No browser-visible path exposed a generated JSON report artifact.
Notes are view-only in the browser; there is no add-note UI to prove append-only behavior.
The browser surface did not expose a live analysis flow or a way to induce/observe AI failure handling.
No live all-infra_error report was reachable from the browser surface.
The browser surface did not expose a live zero-vs-positive replay-confidence comparison.
The populated findings surface was demo-only, so live run-to-analysis data flow was not proven.
Visible axis ranges came from demo data and did not prove live variant-to-analysis propagation.
No single completed study could be compared across overview, runs, findings, and report; the demo overview route crashes.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded analysis-pipeline browser-validation findings: fresh orgs still have no live analyzed-study path, populated findings/report routes are demo-study-only, the demo overview route crashes, and the populated demo findings/report UIs now expose working filters, notes, and evidence links.
